name: Published Acceptable Use Operational Training Augmentation Update
summary: Staged review update to the acceptable-use claim after publication of direct operational state summative training-augmentation evidence and related lower-stakes augmentation and high-stakes detection evidence.
appraisal_follow_up_actions: applicability_boundary: Keep the staged unknown_or_unreviewed_contexts and next action to search more operational technical reports and policy documentation.
construct_mapping: Retain the boundary-condition support role for Wang et al.
method_classification: Keep the staged source-specific labels and limitations rather than generalizing across generation methods.
scorer_validation_relevance: Retain the staged interpretive note and does_not_apply_when language.
source_fidelity: Keep the staged summary and limitations that restrict the direct claim to controlled operational training augmentation.
synthesis_overreach: Retain the staged blockers and final-validation exclusions.
change_note: Adds a narrow controlled operational training-augmentation category to acceptable uses while preserving the boundary against synthetic-only validation, deployment readiness, subgroup fairness, cut-score, or live decision evidence.
